message:
Add BundleCard component for bundle grid display

- Dynamic Lucide icon mapping via iconMap
- Featured badge with sparkle icon
- Prompt ID badges showing included prompts
- Install button copies jfp install command
- Workflow preview with gradient fade
- Staggered animation support via index prop
- View link to /bundles/[id] detail page

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

-{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-leo","title":"Build BundleCard component","description":"**Details:**
- Displays bundle in grid with: icon, title, description, included prompt IDs
- Install bundle button (copies jfp install --bundle command)
- View details link to /bundles/[id]
- Featured badge for featured bundles
- Framer-motion animations

**Props:**
```typescript
interface BundleCardProps {
  bundle: Bundle;
  index: number; // for staggered animation
}
```

**Component Features:**
- Dynamic Lucide icon from bundle.icon field
- Prompt ID badges showing included prompts
- Install button with toast feedback
- Hover effects matching PromptCard style

**Location:** apps/web/src/components/bundle-card.tsx

**Reasoning:** Bundles need visual representation on /bundles page and anywhere bundles are displayed. @@ -0,0 +1,174 @@ +"use client"; + +import { useState, useCallback } from "react"; +import Link from "next/link"; +import { Copy, Check, ExternalLink, Sparkles, Rocket, Code, FileText, Brain, Zap, Package, Star } from "lucide-react"; +import { Card, CardHeader, CardContent, CardFooter } from "@/components/ui/card"; +import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"; +import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; +import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"; +import type { Bundle, BundleIcon } from "@jeffreysprompts/core/prompts/bundles"; + +// ============================================================================ +// Icon Mapping +// ============================================================================ + +const iconMap: Record> = { + sparkles: Sparkles, + rocket: Rocket, + code: Code, + "file-text": FileText, + brain: Brain, + zap: Zap, + package: Package, + star: Star, +}; + +// ============================================================================ +// Props +// ============================================================================ + +interface BundleCardProps { + bundle: Bundle; + index?: number; // for staggered animation +} + +// ============================================================================ +// Component +// ============================================================================ + +export function BundleCard({ bundle, index = 0 }: BundleCardProps) { + const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false); + + // Get icon component + const IconComponent = bundle.icon ? iconMap[bundle.icon] : Package; + + // Copy install command + const handleCopyInstall = useCallback( + async (e: React.MouseEvent) => { + e.preventDefault(); + e.stopPropagation(); + try { + const command = "jfp install " + bundle.promptIds.join(" "); + await navigator.clipboard.writeText(command); + setCopied(true); + setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000); + } catch { + // Clipboard API not available + } + }, + [bundle.promptIds] + ); + + return ( + + +
+
+
+ +
+ {bundle.featured && ( + + + Featured + + )} +
+ + {bundle.promptIds.length} prompts + +
+

+ {bundle.title} +

+ + + +

+ {bundle.description} +

+ + {/* Included prompts */} +
+ {bundle.promptIds.slice(0, 3).map((id) => ( + + {id} + + ))} + {bundle.promptIds.length > 3 && ( + + +{bundle.promptIds.length - 3} more + + )} +
+ + + +
+ {/* Workflow preview */} + {bundle.workflow && ( +
+
+

+ {bundle.workflow.slice(0, 150)}... +

+
+ )} + +
+ + v{bundle.version} + +
+ + +
+
+
+ + + ); +} + +export default BundleCard;
